programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After scratching her way to a million-dollar win, a woman and her husband upsize their retirement plans to include a place on the shores of Pamlico Sound in North Carolina.

programme.title: Australia's Best Pools
programme.desc: Dave is in Adelaide to see a family pool that has everything, Dave gives you a close look into one of his own designs and Dave coins a Mobster pool that is unique, massive and with lots of tiny details.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt Renovation
programme.desc: A family finds a fixer-upper in Lake Country, Wisconsin, in hopes of turning it into a lakefront retreat with a boat dock. The house's outdated style and need for major repairs may break the budget.

programme.title: Holiday Homes in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Amanda Lamb, presenter JB Gill, and DJ and presenter Sam Pinkham are in Empuriabrava, competing to find their favourite holiday rental.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family of eight sets out to build an underground home in the foothills of Idaho, but Mother Nature has other plans. Before they pour concrete, they face a decision that will make or break their build.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: With the help of a local historian and a Revolutionary War expert, the team save a legendary fort dating back to 1775 in Lake Lure, North Carolina.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Second Try for Personal Space in North Carolina
programme.desc: A North Carolina couple can't find a compromise regarding what they need in their new house when he wants enough space for an entertainment room like they had in their last place, but she is more focused on finishing touches that brighten up a home.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Starting Over in the Florida Keys
programme.desc: A buyer starts over after his divorce with a new job in the Florida Keys, but his background in architecture makes him picky when it comes to finding a place with historic charm, so he brings a friend along to keep him grounded.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Big Brisbane Dreams for a Family's First Move
programme.desc: A Minnesota family takes a chance on a job transfer to the warm ocean town of Brisbane, Australia; the promise of more family time motivates the move.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Career Swaps and Trade-Offs in Stockholm
programme.desc: A couple relocates for an opportunity that promises a better work-life balance in Stockholm, Sweden; the move will reduce them to a single income, so the pressure is on to find a place.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A man who has always moved around and loves to travel and meet new people is looking for a large home. Erin and Ben embrace their limitless budget as they design a retreat for him with a Spanish-style kitchen and master suite.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast
programme.desc: Christina's delivery nurse for Hudson just had her fourth child, and she needs help with a recently purchased fixer-upper.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A couple with family across the country want to turn their century-old barn into a home where they can all come together.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Mika and Brian are tasked to exceed the expectations of a family who has a clear vision for their new home's finishes.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Starting Over in the Florida Keys
programme.desc: A buyer starts over after his divorce with a new job in the Florida Keys, but his background in architecture makes him picky when it comes to finding a place with historic charm, so he brings a friend along to keep him grounded.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A man who has always moved around and loves to travel and meet new people is looking for a large home. Erin and Ben embrace their limitless budget as they design a retreat for him with a Spanish-style kitchen and master suite.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast
programme.desc: Christina's delivery nurse for Hudson just had her fourth child, and she needs help with a recently purchased fixer-upper.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Madeline is in Heidelberg at the sculpture museum. Kris visits the world's largest scrap metal art gallery in Port Melbourne. Shane heads to Kilmore to learn the art of salami-making.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: Cruising the almighty Seine River through France, from Paris up to the battlefields of WWI. Enjoying the food and wine of the area, while learning about the history and experiencing the culture.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: A couple's unique, circular home boasts 360-degree windows with stunning wraparound mountain views. But the property lacks function and style. Ben and Cristi take on a challenge they've never faced before.

programme.title: Masters of Flip
programme.desc: Kortney & Dave flip an outdated house into a stunning modern masterpiece. Will their design be up to par with the rest of the neighbourhood, or will they receive some resistance from prospective buyers?

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A couple with family across the country want to turn their century-old barn into a home where they can all come together.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Mika and Brian are tasked to exceed the expectations of a family who has a clear vision for their new home's finishes.

programme.title: Australia's Best Pools
programme.desc: Dave is in Adelaide to see a family pool that has everything, Dave gives you a close look into one of his own designs and Dave coins a Mobster pool that is unique, massive and with lots of tiny details.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After getting a surprise wedding gift in the form of a $1 million scratchie win, a young couple are looking for a home with old-fashioned charm and space to start a family in Worcester, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A man who has always moved around and loves to travel and meet new people is looking for a large home. Erin and Ben embrace their limitless budget as they design a retreat for him with a Spanish-style kitchen and master suite.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a vacant lot, and what begins as a new construction quickly turns into a build for Mina's friends. A lingering pipe issue may add time and a hefty price tag to the project.

programme.title: The Nate & Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: A couple dreams of raising their own family in his grandparents' 1950s home, but the house needs major updates.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: Cruising the almighty Seine River through France, from Paris up to the battlefields of WWI. Enjoying the food and wine of the area, while learning about the history and experiencing the culture.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Madeline is in Heidelberg at the sculpture museum. Kris visits the world's largest scrap metal art gallery in Port Melbourne. Shane heads to Kilmore to learn the art of salami-making.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a four-bedroom home in Cypress, California, that the owner is looking to sell quickly. The home is a mess but already has an open floor plan which will save them money.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, CA, with a fantastic view. When strange additions and design challenges collide, however, this quick flip turns out to be harder than anticipated.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: The teams continue to struggle as their build seasons come to a close. Jackie's team hurries to finish the interior, the Owens team is at risk of not finishing on time.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A couple with family across the country want to turn their century-old barn into a home where they can all come together.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: All the contestants must turn their attention to the common area where decisions need to be made; it's halfway through the week and work on the guest bedrooms comes to a halt as a huge storm hits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina believe they have a lead on an easy house to flip in Rowland Heights, California, but once they get inside, they find a lot of problems that will test their skills.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good deal in a familiar neighbourhood in Anaheim, California. They need to act fast if they want to lock it in, but they have to make an offer without seeing the inside.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast
programme.desc: Christina's delivery nurse for Hudson just had her fourth child, and she needs help with a recently purchased fixer-upper.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Attempting to Adult in Maroochydore, Australia
programme.desc: An aspiring radio personality leaves London for her dream job in Maroochydore, Australia.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Empty Nest Adventure in the Netherlands
programme.desc: A couple from Maryland leaves everything behind for their home country of the Netherlands. He's looking for a place in the countryside, but she prefers something in the city.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Big House for a Blended Family
programme.desc: Since relocating from Arizona, a family of six has been crammed into a tiny rental as they search for a home in Chattanooga. She wants a fixer to stretch their money, but he prefers something that's move-in ready.

programme.title: Masters of Flip
programme.desc: Kortney and Dave tackle a massive flip that requires a large bump out and a possible second building.

programme.title: Small Town Potential
programme.desc: Davina and Kristin deliver a home with a great kitchen and room to grow.

programme.title: 100 Day Hotel Challenge
programme.desc: In the season finale, Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt bring back all their teammates to help tackle the hotel exteriors. The Scott Brothers have help judging as they decide who takes home $50,000 charity prize!

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Blue Toes and Shower Woes in Avon, North Carolina
programme.desc: After discovering Avon, North Carolina during a beach vacation, a family of four searches for a fixer-upper. Once they've found their hidden gem, it's all hands on deck.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Attempting to Adult in Maroochydore, Australia
programme.desc: An aspiring radio personality leaves London for her dream job in Maroochydore, Australia.

programme.desc: A couple from Maryland leaves everything behind for their home country of the Netherlands. He's looking for a place in the countryside, but she prefers something in the city.

programme.desc: Kortney and Dave tackle a massive flip that requires a large bump out and a possible second building.

programme.desc: Davina and Kristin deliver a home with a great kitchen and room to grow.

programme.desc: In the season finale, Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt bring back all their teammates to help tackle the hotel exteriors. The Scott Brothers have help judging as they decide who takes home $50,000 charity prize!

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Blue Toes and Shower Woes in Avon, North Carolina
programme.desc: After discovering Avon, North Carolina during a beach vacation, a family of four searches for a fixer-upper. Once they've found their hidden gem, it's all hands on deck.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina believe they have a lead on an easy house to flip in Rowland Heights, California, but once they get inside, they find a lot of problems that will test their skills.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good deal in a familiar neighbourhood in Anaheim, California. They need to act fast if they want to lock it in, but they have to make an offer without seeing the inside.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Empty Nest Adventure in the Netherlands
programme.desc: A couple from Maryland leaves everything behind for their home country of the Netherlands. He's looking for a place in the countryside, but she prefers something in the city.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Big House for a Blended Family
programme.desc: Since relocating from Arizona, a family of six has been crammed into a tiny rental as they search for a home in Chattanooga. She wants a fixer to stretch their money, but he prefers something that's move-in ready.

programme.title: Holiday Homes in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Amanda Lamb, presenter JB Gill, and DJ and presenter Sam Pinkham are in Empuriabrava, competing to find their favourite holiday rental.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: The gurus are back with an autumn series. On this special first episode, Trevor tackles the difficult task of recovery, rehabilitation from the impacts of our Australian summer, and prevention for future seasons.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: All the contestants must turn their attention to the common area where decisions need to be made; it's halfway through the week and work on the guest bedrooms comes to a halt as a huge storm hits.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Attempting to Adult in Maroochydore, Australia
programme.desc: An aspiring radio personality leaves London for her dream job in Maroochydore, Australia.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Empty Nest Adventure in the Netherlands
programme.desc: A newly-empty-nester couple from Maryland leaves everything behind for his home country of the Netherlands. He's looking for a place with plenty of open space in the countryside, but she prefers something in the city center.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Big House for a Blended Family
programme.desc: Since relocating from Arizona, a family of six has been crammed into a tiny rental as they search for a home in Chattanooga. She wants a fixer to stretch their money, but he prefers something that's move-in ready.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in Rowland Heights, CA. This three-bedroom, two-bath house should be a quick flip, but once they get inside they find big problems that will take all their skills to fix.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good deal in a familiar neighbourhood in Anaheim, California. They need to act fast if they want to lock it in, but they have to make an offer without seeing the inside.

programme.title: Masters Of Flip
programme.desc: Kortney and Dave tackle a massive flip that requires a large bump out and a possible second building. As Kortney works with her team on a bright and airy design plan, Dave does everything in his power to scale down the size of the project.

programme.title: 100 Day Hotel Challenge
programme.desc: In the season finale, Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt bring back all their teammates to help tackle the hotel exteriors. Also, the Scott Brothers have help judging as they decide who takes home the bragging rights and the $50,000 charity prize!
